description: The minimum-required field set that any object claiming to be a constitutional Finding must declare. Authority: ADR-056 D3. The constitutional concept of Finding has three parallel surfaces in src/ (CIM CheckResult, audit_runs.findings JSONB via AuditFinding, BlackboardEntry.payload for entry_type='finding'). This contract is the abstract nucleus they must all satisfy; layer-specific extension fields are permitted in principle but reported as undeclared by the current AST gate check (a design choice — extensions to a closed nucleus are drift to be made visible, not silently absorbed). Version 1.1.0: AuditFinding added to governed_classes (ADR-056 Wave 1, Session 2). BlackboardEntry payload family to be added in Wave 1 Session 3.

rule_id.description: The constitutional rule whose violation this finding reports.

severity.description: Governed severity level. The audit_severity vs CIM-Pydantic severity vocabulary reconciliation is TBD (see enums.json description for audit_severity); contract does not bind to either enum yet.

subject.description: The artefact (file path, symbol qualname, module name) where the violation was detected.

evidence.description: Human-readable description of what was found.

worker_uuid.description: UUID of the worker that detected and posted this finding.
